meta.title: Miner Pulse — subscription
hero.title: Miner Pulse
hero.subtitle: ASIC miner monitoring. Client / Service subscription.
plans.title: Plans
plans.duration: {days} days · up to {devices} devices in plan
beta.banner: Beta testing: choose your plan and device limit in the client portal after registration. Payments are not enabled yet.
beta.notice: During beta you can pick a plan and device count yourself. Terms may change after beta; the site does not accept payments yet.
subscribe.title: Choose subscription
subscribe.devicesHint: Up to {max} devices during beta testing.
subscribe.success: Subscription activated. You can now generate an app activation code.
auth.title: Account
auth.hint: Sign in with your email and password.
account.appHint: One-time code to sign in to the desktop app.
auth.subscriptionNone: No active subscription — contact the administrator.
auth.subscriptionNoneBeta: No subscription selected — choose a plan and device count below.
auth.registerSuccess: Account created. Sign in with the same email and password.
modal.login.title: Sign in
modal.register.title: Register
error.beta_disabled: Self-service subscription is not available right now
error.device_count_too_high: Too many devices for the beta period
error.device_count_below_connected: Remove extra devices first — you have more connected than the selected limit
devices.title: Devices
devices.col.name: Device
devices.deleteConfirm: Remove this device? You will need to sign in again in the desktop app on that PC.
logs.title: Diagnostic logs
logs.hint: Logs uploaded from the app (About → Upload diagnostic log).
storage.title: Credential storage
storage.sharedLabel: Shared storage across all my computers
storage.hint: When off, each computer keeps its own credential set (by HWID).
